ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Full name of the state */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Two-character code for the state (e.g., AL, AK, CA) */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the state */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the state */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_group_name" TEXT /* Name of the age group (e.g., Under 5 Years, 5 to 13 Years) */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the age group */,
  "age_group_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the age group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_data" (
  "population_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population data record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Population count for the state and age group */,
  "population_date" TEXT /* Date of the population data */,
  "population_source" TEXT /* Source of the population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("population_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_data_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographic_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic trend record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "trend_name" TEXT /* Name of the demographic trend (e.g., population growth rate) */,
  "trend_value" REAL /* Value of the demographic trend */,
  "trend_date" TEXT /* Date of the demographic trend */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the demographic trend */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographic_trends_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (e.g., researcher, analyst, policy maker) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level granted to the user for the state (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_growth_rates" (
  "growth_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population growth rate record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Population growth rate for the state and age group */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("growth_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_growth_rates_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_ages" (
  "median_age_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median age record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "median_age" REAL /* Median age for the state and age group */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("median_age_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_ages_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_ages_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "population_densities" (
  "density_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each population density record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density for the state and age group */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("density_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_densities_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_population_densities_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level for the state and age group (e.g., high school, bachelor's degree) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the education level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_levels_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_statistics" (
  "healthcare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare statistic record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "healthcare_statistic" TEXT /* Healthcare statistic for the state and age group (e.g., number of hospitals, healthcare spending) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the healthcare statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("healthcare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_statistics_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_statistics_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "economic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the age group */,
  "economic_indicator" TEXT /* Economic indicator for the state and age group (e.g., GDP, unemployment rate) */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date of the data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "data_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the economic indicator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "state_economies" (
  "economy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state economy record */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the state */,
  "exports" REAL /* Exports of the state */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the state */,
  "unemployment_rate_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the unemployment rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("economy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_state_economies_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industry_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry sector record */,
  "industry_sector" TEXT /* Name of the industry sector (e.g., manufacturing, finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry sector */,
  "sector_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the industry sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sector_employment" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the industry sector */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state */,
  "employment_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the industry sector and state */,
  "employment_date" TEXT /* Date of the employment data */,
  "employment_source" TEXT /* Source of the employment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_employment_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("sector_id") REFERENCES industry_sectors ("sector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sector_employment_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)
